parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title
**OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow**
//with SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning//
end title

participant "HealthCloud" as HC #28a745
participant "Embedded Browser" as EB #28a745

box "HealthSphere" #lightblue
participant "Apigee Edge" as AE #ffc107
participant "Orion Health Platform" as OHP #ffc107
end box

HC -> EB
EB -> AE : GET /authorize?response_type=code
activate AE
AE --> EB : //302// https://**<redirect_url>** (SAML OR token)
deactivate AE

group SAML Authentication
    EB -> AE : POST /oauth2/saml
    activate AE
    AE -> OHP : POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current
    activate OHP
    OHP -> OHP : Verify SAMLResponse
    OHP --> AE
    deactivate OHP
    AE -> AE : Generate authorization code
    AE --> EB : //302// https://**<redirect_url>**?code=<code>
    deactivate AE
end

HC -> AE : POST /token?code=<code>
activate AE
AE --> HC : 200 access_token + refresh_token
deactivate AE

@enduml
```
